stdout:
## Acceptance Criteria

Pass. `jit plan <id>` and `jit issue create --with-planning` both bracket a container by creating a planning node, wiring the container to depend on it, and applying the plan-review preset: [plan.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/plan.rs:319), [main.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/main.rs:404), [main.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/main.rs:1094).

Pre-existing upstream dependencies are moved from the container onto the planning node at [plan.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/plan.rs:328), with coverage in [plan_scaffold_tests.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/tests/plan_scaffold_tests.rs:108). No breakdown node is created, covered at [plan_scaffold_tests.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/tests/plan_scaffold_tests.rs:142) and [plan_scaffold_tests.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/tests/plan_scaffold_tests.rs:308).

## Architecture And Separation Of Concerns

Pass. The bracket orchestration stays in `commands/plan.rs`, CLI parsing stays in `cli.rs`, and output formatting stays in `main.rs`. Persistence is accessed through `IssueStore`; I found no domain/storage/CLI boundary violation.

## Functional Paradigm

Pass. The implementation is acceptable command-layer orchestration. Label transformation uses iterator combinators at [plan.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/plan.rs:335), while mutation sequencing is pragmatic for storage-backed command behavior.

## Correctness And Invariants

Pass. The prior event-log issue is fixed: external plan document references now save the planning issue and append an `issue_updated` event for `documents` at [plan.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/plan.rs:424). The regression test verifies this at [plan_scaffold_tests.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/tests/plan_scaffold_tests.rs:219).

Atomic writes remain behind storage. Gate semantics, assignee/label formats, PID safety, and unsafe-code policy show no regression in this change.

## Safety

Pass. No `unsafe` code or PID-handling changes were introduced in the reviewed scope.

## Testing

Pass. Current recorded gate evidence for this issue shows `cargo-ci` passed on commit `609a3dbb80a29c3b31d58fe44a4bb4c98e67bd31`: `.jit/gate-runs/a1dc96d0-943a-4906-943a-2619126d4668/result.json`.

I also ran:

```text
cargo test -p jit --test plan_scaffold_tests --quiet
./scripts/jit-validate.sh
```

The focused scaffold tests passed: 13 passed, 0 failed. Repository validation passed with label warnings only, which are allowed by the review instructions.

## Error Handling

Pass. Fallible command paths return `Result`, and user-facing errors for missing planning config and non-breakable container types include context at [plan.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/plan.rs:76) and [plan.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/plan.rs:303). No new library `unwrap()`/`expect()` usage was introduced outside tests.

## CLI Contract

Pass. `jit plan` exposes `--json` at [cli.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/cli.rs:65). `issue create --with-planning` reuses `issue create --json` and routes structured output through `print_plan_result` at [main.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/main.rs:84).

## Documentation

Pass. The new public `PlanResult` and command methods have doc comments with examples, starting at [plan.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/plan.rs:37), [plan.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/plan.rs:85), and [plan.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/plan.rs:163).

## Prior Review Feedback

Resolved. The most recent prior review failed because external plan document references were persisted without an event. The current commit adds the missing `issue_updated` event and a regression test for it.

## JIT Issue Management

Pass. The provided issue dependencies `1536006d` and `6a82ca5d` are both `done`. `./scripts/jit-validate.sh` passed locally with allowed label warnings.

VERDICT: PASS

Gate result: PASSED
